match.userMessage:

<CURRENT_SCENE>
{
  "sceneId": "scene_001",
  "sceneNumber": 1,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT\n\nWide cinematic frame under bright natural window light. Rain streaks glass in crisp detail, casting clean directional shadows across white desks. Reporter's hands move with effortless rhythm across glowing terminal, keys clicking softly. Color palette pops: crisp whites, warm skin tones, soft sage accents in the background.\n\nClose-up macro: fingers press textured keys, shallow depth of field, editorial energy. Handheld micro-movement follows the motion.",
    "dialogue": []
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Newsroom Terminal Work",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Establishing the newsroom atmosphere and reporter preparing for the story"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Wide cinematic frame inside a newsroom at night showcasing REPORTER hands moving with effortless rhythm across the textured keys of a glowing terminal, rain streaks in sharp detail on the large glass windows casting clean directional shadows over white desks and soft sage accents, bright natural window light with crisp highlights and immediate punchy contrast, shallow depth of field keeping the keys and screen glow in tactile focus while softly blurring the background, modern editorial style with high-key airy atmosphere and effortless cool energy, dynamic handheld camera angle capturing natural micro-movement, clean bright color grading with true-to-life whites and warm tones.",
      "negativePrompt": "text, signs, dialogue, holograms, floating interfaces, blurred motion, heavy diffusion, artificial lighting, overly dramatic shadows, cluttered desks, people faces or full bodies",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Wide establishing shot of a reporter's hands typing on a glowing terminal inside a nighttime newsroom with rain on the windows.",
        "subject": "REPORTER hands moving across the keys of a glowing terminal.",
        "environment": "Modern newsroom at night featuring white desks, large rain-streaked windows, and soft sage background accents.",
        "lighting": "Bright natural window light creating clean directional shadows across surfaces.",
        "camera": "Wide cinematic handheld angle with natural micro-movement and shallow depth of field.",
        "composition": "Hands centered on the terminal as the focal point with rain-streaked windows providing layered background detail.",
        "style": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy and high-key airy treatment.",
        "technical": "16:9 aspect ratio, crisp detail on textures, true-to-life color grading.",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool with focused calm energy."
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "reporter"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "int_newsroom_night",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "#FFFFFF #F0E6D3 #E8F4E8 #1A1A1A",
    "lightingSetup": "bright natural window light with clean directional shadows",
    "styleTag": "modern editorial with tactile energy"
  }
}
</CURRENT_SCENE>

(Context: Where is the movement coming from?)
(none)
</SCENE_BEFORE>

<SCENE_AFTER>
(Context: Where does the movement need to end up?)
{
  "sceneId": "scene_002",
  "sceneNumber": 2,
  "originalScript": {
    "extract": "Cut to producer entering frame, printed lede in hand.\n\nPRODUCER (O.S.)\nStory just broke.\n\nREPORTER\nWe go live in ten.",
    "dialogue": [
      {
        "character": "PRODUCER",
        "line": "Story just broke.",
        "tone": "urgent"
      },
      {
        "character": "REPORTER",
        "line": "We go live in ten.",
        "tone": "focused determined"
      }
    ]
  },
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Breaking News Alert",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "storyBeat": "Producer delivers breaking story update; decision to go live"
  },
  "prompts": {
    "visual": {
      "fullPrompt": "Modern social-first editorial photograph with tactile energy and crisp natural realism captures the starting frame of a newsroom scene where PRODUCER strides into view from the right holding a folded printed lede document in one hand with muscles tensed in mid-motion and purposeful forward lean while REPORTER sits upright at a white desk turning slightly toward the newcomer with focused expression and hands pausing above a keyboard, expansive interior of sleek white desks stretching into soft-focus background with large rain-streaked windows allowing cool night air and city glow to filter through, bright natural window light slicing clean directional shadows across surfaces and creating high-key airy contrast with subtle warm skin-tone highlights against neutral whites and soft sage wall accents, shallow depth of field keeps foreground action sharp while softening distant monitors and office details, dynamic handheld eye-level framing with natural micro-movement and gentle anamorphic flare on the window highlights in a balanced 16:9 composition full of implied momentum.",
      "negativePrompt": "blurry motion, floating holograms, text overlays, signs, heavy diffusion, artificial studio lighting, cluttered chaos, distorted proportions",
      "components": {
        "sceneDescription": "Producer entering frame with printed lede in hand as reporter pauses work and responds to the urgent update",
        "subject": "PRODUCER mid-stride holding document and REPORTER at desk turning toward the entrance",
        "environment": "Modern newsroom interior at night with white desks, rain-streaked windows, soft sage accents, and city glow beyond glass",
        "lighting": "Bright natural window light with crisp directional shadows, high-key airy quality and subtle warm highlights",
        "camera": "Dynamic handheld eye-level angle with shallow depth of field and gentle anamorphic flare",
        "composition": "Balanced 16:9 frame placing producer on right entering toward centered reporter with foreground sharpness",
        "style": "Modern social-first product photography adapted to cinematic editorial energy with tactile realism",
        "technical": "High-resolution clean detail, true-to-life color, shallow focus on action, natural micro-movement",
        "atmosphere": "Fresh urgent energy with crisp night-time realism and implied forward momentum"
      }
    }
  },
  "continuity": {
    "characterTags": [
      "reporter",
      "producer"
    ],
    "environmentTag": "int_newsroom_night",
    "elementTags": [],
    "colorPalette": "#FFFFFF #F0E6D3 #1A1A1A #E8F4E8",
    "lightingSetup": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows and high-key airy fill",
    "styleTag": "modern_editorial_cinematic_handheld"
  }
}
</SCENE_AFTER>

<DIRECTOR_STYLE>
(Strictly apply camera movement and pacing preferences)
{
  "mood": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool",
  "artStyle": "Modern social-first product photography with tactile, editorial energy. Products shown in real-life context -- hands opening packaging, fingers pressing textures, products on bathroom shelves, kitchen counters, rumpled linen. Close-up detail shots emphasize material and finish. Flat-lays with curated minimal arrangements. Color-matched backgrounds that complement the product. Every frame feels like something you would screenshot and save",
  "lighting": "Bright natural window light with clean directional shadows. Direct on-camera flash for punchy editorial energy on select shots. No heavy diffusion -- let light feel real and immediate. Golden hour warmth for lifestyle moments. High-key and airy overall with pops of contrast",
  "colorPalette": [
    "#FFFFFF",
    "#F0E6D3",
    "#D4536D",
    "#1A1A1A",
    "#E8F4E8"
  ],
  "cameraWork": "Dynamic mix of handheld and locked shots with consistent energy. Handheld with natural micro-movement for lifestyle moments -- hands interacting, daily rituals, real context. Quick-cut to locked beauty frames for hero product shots. Macro details on textures and surfaces. Overhead flat-lays directly above. Eye-level and slightly above angles. Shallow depth of field on tactile details. Energetic pacing -- no lingering, every frame earns its time",
  "referenceFilms": [
    "Rhode Skin Instagram",
    "Glossier Visual Identity",
    "Summer Fridays Campaigns",
    "Drunk Elephant Content"
  ],
  "colorGrading": "Clean and bright with true-to-life color. Whites are crisp, skin tones warm and natural. Minimal processing -- the product looks like it does in your hand. Slight warmth in highlights, lifted shadows keeping everything airy. One accent color pops against neutral base"
}
</DIRECTOR_STYLE>

<ASPECT_RATIO>
16:9
</ASPECT_RATIO>
